pets.name: Max
pets.description: Max is an energetic Golden Retriever who arrived at the shelter after his previous family realized they could no longer give him the time, exercise, and attention he needed. He has clearly known kindness before, because he approaches people with trust, warmth, and a constantly wagging tail. Max is healthy, strong, and always ready for a game of fetch, a long walk, or a bit of training with treats. He already understands basic routines and responds well to positive encouragement. Because he is still young and full of energy, he would do best with an active adopter or family who can include him in daily life rather than leaving him alone for long periods. He is friendly with children who know how to respect dogs, and he may also get along with another sociable dog after a proper introduction. Max would be a joyful, loyal companion for a home that enjoys outdoor adventures and affectionate evenings indoors.

pets.name: Luna
pets.description: Luna is a graceful Greyhound mix who came from a quiet home where she was loved, but her owner could no longer care for her properly. She is healthy, elegant, and gentle, with the kind of calm presence that makes a room feel softer when she is in it. Luna enjoys peaceful walks, warm blankets, and resting near a window where she can watch the world without feeling rushed. She is not a dog who needs constant noise or excitement. Instead, she prefers a predictable routine, kind voices, and people who understand that trust can build slowly. She may be shy at first in a new environment, but once she feels safe, she becomes deeply loyal and affectionate. Luna would suit an adult household, a quiet couple, or a family with older children. She may do well with another calm dog, but she would not enjoy a chaotic home with too much rough play.

pets.name: Charlie
pets.description: Charlie is a playful Beagle puppy who was found wandering near a residential street, curious about everything and clearly looking for someone to follow home. He is healthy, bright-eyed, and full of puppy energy. Charlie loves sniffing, exploring, chasing toys, and investigating every corner of the garden. As a Beagle, he is guided by his nose, so he will need secure outdoor spaces and patient training to help him learn good habits. He is affectionate and friendly, but he is also young, which means he still needs structure, consistency, and plenty of positive reinforcement. Charlie would be a great match for adopters who enjoy active dogs and are ready for the time commitment that comes with raising a puppy. He could live with children who understand gentle handling, and he may enjoy another playful dog companion. With training and routine, Charlie will grow into a funny, loving, and loyal family dog.

pets.name: Bella
pets.description: Bella is an intelligent Border Collie who previously lived around a small farm environment, where she learned to be alert, observant, and very responsive to movement and routine. She is healthy, focused, and happiest when she has a job to do, even if that job is learning tricks, practicing commands, or going on structured walks. Bella is not the kind of dog who will be satisfied with a short walk and an empty afternoon. She needs mental stimulation, daily activity, and an owner who enjoys working with a clever dog. She is affectionate once she trusts someone, but she can be intense and watchful, especially in unfamiliar situations. Bella would be best suited to an experienced adopter, an active household, or someone interested in training, agility, hiking, or advanced obedience. She may do well with older children and calm dogs, but she needs introductions handled carefully. In the right home, Bella will be devoted, impressive, and deeply rewarding.

pets.name: Whiskers
pets.description: Whiskers is a charming tabby cat who was surrendered when his previous owner moved into housing where pets were not allowed. He arrived confused at first, but he quickly showed his affectionate, people-loving nature. Whiskers is healthy, playful, and very good at balancing independence with companionship. During the day, he likes chasing small toys, watching birds through the window, and inspecting anything new in the home. In the evening, he becomes a cozy lap cat who enjoys gentle attention and quiet company. Whiskers has a friendly temperament and could suit many homes, including a family with respectful children. He may also adapt to another calm cat after a slow introduction, though he would be perfectly happy as the main feline companion in the household. He is a lovely choice for someone who wants a cat with personality, warmth, and enough confidence to become part of everyday family life.

pets.name: Mittens
pets.description: Mittens is a graceful Siamese-style cat with striking blue eyes and a calm, thoughtful personality. She was rescued as a young cat from a busy neighborhood, where she had clearly learned to be cautious around noise and sudden movement. Since arriving in care, she has become healthier, more relaxed, and increasingly affectionate with people who give her time. Mittens enjoys soft beds, quiet windowsills, and watching the household from a safe, comfortable spot. She is not demanding, but she does form strong bonds once she decides someone is trustworthy. She would do best in a calm home, ideally with adults or older children who understand that some cats need gentle introductions. Mittens may tolerate another peaceful cat, but she would not enjoy a loud or crowded environment. For the right adopter, she will become a loyal, elegant companion who brings calm beauty and quiet affection into the home.

pets.name: Smokey
pets.description: Smokey is a majestic long-haired tabby cat with a calm and thoughtful nature. He previously lived with an elderly owner and is used to soft routines, quiet rooms, and the comfort of familiar people nearby. After losing that stable home, Smokey needed time to adjust, but he has remained gentle, dignified, and patient. He is healthy, well-mannered, and enjoys being brushed, resting near warm places, and quietly supervising the household from a comfortable chair. Smokey is affectionate, but he does not usually demand constant attention. He prefers slow trust, soft voices, and people who appreciate a mature cat with a steady personality. He would be ideal for a single adopter, a couple, or a calm family with older children. Because of his long coat, he will need regular grooming to stay comfortable. Smokey would make a wonderful companion for someone looking for a peaceful, loyal, and elegant cat.

pets.name: Nala
pets.description: Nala is an elegant ginger cat with a curious and attentive personality. She was cared for by a kind neighbor after appearing regularly in a shared courtyard, but that person could not keep her permanently. Nala is healthy, bright, and alert, with a gentle confidence that grows stronger when she feels safe. She enjoys sunny spots, quiet observation, and short play sessions with soft toys or ribbons. She is not overly clingy, but she likes being near people and will often settle in the same room to keep company. Nala would do well in a calm indoor home where she can explore at her own pace and build trust without pressure. She may live with older children who respect her boundaries, and she could possibly accept another calm cat after gradual introductions. Nala is a lovely match for someone who enjoys independent cats with warmth, intelligence, and subtle affection.

pets.name: Nibbles
pets.description: Nibbles is a cute Syrian hamster who came from a home where the children had gradually lost interest in small pet care. He is healthy, active, and especially fun to watch in the evening when he begins his busy routine. Nibbles loves running on his wheel, exploring tunnels, collecting food, and arranging his bedding into the perfect nest. He is not a toy and should not be handled roughly, but with patience and gentle hands, he can become comfortable being picked up for short periods. Nibbles would be a good choice for a first-time small pet owner who is willing to learn proper hamster care, including a spacious enclosure, deep bedding, safe chew items, and quiet daytime rest. He would suit a responsible family with older children or an adult who enjoys caring for small animals. Nibbles brings a lot of charm in a tiny, energetic package.

pets.name: Cheeks
pets.description: Cheeks is a tiny dwarf hamster with an adorable round body and a lively personality. She was born in an accidental litter and has been carefully handled since she was young, which has helped her become curious and confident in her own small way. Cheeks is healthy, quick, and very active in the evening, especially when she is gathering food, using her wheel, or disappearing into little hiding places. Because she is small and fast, she needs a secure habitat and calm handling from someone who understands that dwarf hamsters can be delicate. She is wonderful to observe and can become comfortable with a patient owner, but she is not suitable for rough or very young children. Cheeks would thrive with plenty of bedding, tunnels, safe chew toys, and a quiet corner of the home. She is a delightful small companion for someone who enjoys gentle, attentive care.

pets.name: Peanut
pets.description: Peanut is a black and white lop-eared rabbit with a gentle and curious personality. He came from a family home where he was loved, but his owners did not have enough space or time to continue caring for him properly. Peanut is healthy, calm, and enjoys fresh vegetables, good-quality hay, and exploring safe indoor areas under supervision. He likes having cozy baskets and soft places to rest, but he also needs daily time outside his enclosure to hop, stretch, and investigate. Peanut is friendly when approached gently and may become very affectionate once he trusts his people. He would do well in a home with adults or older children who understand that rabbits need careful handling and a stable routine. He could potentially bond with another rabbit after a proper introduction. Peanut is a sweet, steady companion for someone ready to provide real rabbit care.

pets.name: Daisy
pets.description: Daisy is a fluffy cream-colored rabbit with a soft coat and a curious nature. She was rescued from an overcrowded home, where she had not received as much individual attention as she deserved. With patient care, Daisy has become healthier, calmer, and more confident. She enjoys fresh greens, good hay, gentle voices, and quiet spaces where she can explore without being startled. Because of her fluffy coat, she will need regular grooming to prevent tangles and keep her comfortable. Daisy is sweet but can be a little cautious at first, so she would do best with an adopter who understands that trust takes time. She may be suitable for a calm household with older children, but she should not be treated like a cuddly toy. Daisy will reward patience with gentle companionship, soft curiosity, and a peaceful presence in the home.

pets.name: Rio
pets.description: Rio is a vibrant macaw with colorful feathers, a lively personality, and a very intelligent mind. He came from an owner who cared for him deeply but could no longer manage the time, space, and enrichment that a large parrot needs. Rio is healthy, social, and expressive, but he is not a beginner pet. He needs daily interaction, problem-solving toys, safe out-of-cage time, and an adopter who understands large parrots and their long-term emotional needs. Rio can be loud, curious, and demanding when bored, but he can also be affectionate, funny, and deeply bonded with the right person. He would do best with an experienced bird owner who can offer structure, patience, and a stable routine. Rio should not be adopted simply because he is beautiful. He needs a committed home that respects his intelligence, sensitivity, and long lifespan.

pets.name: Polly
pets.description: Polly is a cheerful budgerigar who loves chirping, playing with toys, and interacting with people from a safe perch. She came to the shelter after her previous owner moved abroad and wanted her to find a stable new home. Polly is healthy, curious, and full of small-bird energy. She enjoys mirrors, swings, gentle conversation, and having a predictable daily routine. She is social but should be handled patiently, especially while she adjusts to a new environment. Polly would be a good match for someone looking for a small companion bird who brings sound, movement, and personality into the home. She may also enjoy another compatible budgie if introduced carefully. Polly needs a clean cage, fresh food, safe toys, and time outside the cage in a secure room. With kindness and consistency, she can become a delightful everyday companion.

pets.name: Rex
pets.description: Rex is a loyal Golden Retriever with a calm and affectionate temperament. He previously lived with a family and is used to normal household routines, gentle handling, and being close to people. Rex is healthy, friendly, and has a mature steadiness that makes him very comforting to be around. He enjoys relaxing indoors, going for walks, and spending time with humans who treat him as part of the family. Rex is not as frantic as a young puppy, but he still needs regular exercise, companionship, and mental stimulation to stay happy. He may do well with children who understand respectful behavior around dogs, and he could also get along with another calm dog after a proper introduction. Rex would suit a family, a couple, or an individual looking for a warm-hearted, reliable companion with a gentle personality and a lot of love to give.
pets.statusNote: Normalized from adopted to available for the integrated current-shelter inventory dataset.

pets.name: Sophie
pets.description: Sophie is a beautiful long-haired silver tabby cat with a calm and dignified personality. She arrived at the shelter after her previous owner became unable to care for her, and she has handled the change with quiet patience. Sophie is healthy, gentle, and happiest in peaceful rooms where she can rest on soft surfaces and observe the world without too much noise. She appreciates slow introductions and does not like being rushed, but once she trusts someone, she enjoys gentle attention and quiet companionship. Because of her long coat, Sophie will need regular brushing to keep her fur clean and comfortable. She would be best suited to a calm home with adults or older children who respect her space. Sophie is not a chaotic, high-energy cat. She is elegant, steady, and deeply rewarding for someone who values a peaceful feline friend.

pets.name: Biscuit
pets.description: Biscuit is a cream-colored Syrian hamster with a calm temperament and a sweet, watchful expression. He came from a small home breeding situation and has been doing very well with careful, gentle handling. Biscuit is healthy, tidy in his habitat, and usually becomes active in the evening when he starts exploring, chewing, and collecting food. He enjoys cardboard tubes, safe wooden chews, deep bedding, and having a quiet place to retreat when he wants privacy. Biscuit could be a good small pet for a responsible family with older children, but he needs to be handled gently and never woken suddenly during the day. He would also suit an adult who enjoys setting up enriching habitats and watching small animals behave naturally. Biscuit is a calm, charming little companion who deserves a safe and thoughtful home.

pets.name: Flopsy
pets.description: Flopsy is a gray and white lop-eared rabbit with adorable floppy ears and a social personality. She has lived around other rabbits before and may enjoy a carefully introduced rabbit companion in the right home. Flopsy is healthy, curious, and enjoys fresh hay, leafy greens, and supervised playtime outside her enclosure. She likes investigating tunnels, low boxes, and safe corners where she can stretch and relax. Flopsy responds well to gentle people and may become quite affectionate once she feels secure. She would suit an adopter who understands rabbit body language, proper diet, and the importance of daily movement. A home with respectful older children could work well, but she should always be handled carefully. Flopsy is a sweet rabbit with a balanced mix of curiosity, sociability, and calmness, and she will thrive with patient, consistent care.

pets.name: Sunny
pets.description: Sunny is a bright canary with a beautiful singing voice and a cheerful presence. He came from a small aviary where he was well cared for but needed a more permanent home. Sunny is healthy, active, and enjoys a calm environment with natural light, fresh food, clean water, and a spacious cage where he can move comfortably. He is best suited for someone who enjoys watching and listening to birds rather than handling them frequently, as canaries usually prefer observation over direct contact. Sunny can bring a gentle, uplifting atmosphere to a room with his song and movement. He would not enjoy a loud, stressful household or a cage that is too small. With good care, routine cleaning, and a peaceful setting, Sunny will be a delightful companion for anyone who loves the quiet joy of songbirds.

pets.name: Buddy
pets.description: Buddy is a gentle chocolate Labrador Retriever with a sweet and loving nature. He came to the shelter through no fault of his own after changes in his previous household made it impossible for his family to keep him. Buddy is healthy, affectionate, and happiest when he can be close to people. He enjoys calm walks, cozy indoor spaces, and being included in everyday family life. Because he is already mature, he has a settled personality and does not have the same chaotic energy as a puppy, though he still needs exercise, attention, and regular routines. Buddy may be a good match for a family with children, a couple, or an individual looking for a loyal companion. He may also get along with another friendly dog after a careful introduction. Buddy is the kind of dog who quietly becomes part of your heart and home.

pets.name: Shadow
pets.description: Shadow is a sleek black cat with a calm and affectionate personality. He was found as a stray, but he clearly had experience around people and settled into shelter life with quiet confidence. Shadow is healthy, gentle, and enjoys sunny windowsills, soft blankets, and relaxed play sessions with toys that let him stalk and pounce. He is affectionate without being overly demanding and often prefers to stay near people rather than climb all over them. Shadow would be a great indoor companion for someone who wants a loving cat with an easygoing nature. He may do well in a calm home with adults, older children, or possibly another peaceful cat after a slow introduction. Black cats are sometimes overlooked, but Shadow has the kind of steady warmth and quiet charm that can make a house feel like home.

pets.name: Pip
pets.description: Pip is a curious dwarf hamster who loves exploring tunnels and building cozy nests. He was surrendered by a family who wanted him to have more attentive care and a better habitat. Pip is healthy, active, and especially fun to watch during his evening routines, when he starts gathering food, climbing through tubes, and rearranging his bedding. Because he is small and quick, he needs a secure enclosure and calm handling from someone who understands dwarf hamsters. Pip is not the right pet for rough play, but he is a wonderful choice for a patient adopter who enjoys observing small animals and creating an enriching environment. He will appreciate deep bedding, chew toys, a proper wheel, and several hiding places. Pip may be tiny, but his personality is lively, curious, and full of charm.

pets.name: Hazel
pets.description: Hazel is a small black hamster with a sweet and curious personality. She came from a home where several hamsters were being rehomed, and she has been steadily gaining confidence with gentle care. Hazel is healthy, alert, and loves running on her wheel, collecting treats, and creating secret little hiding spots in her bedding. She can be a little cautious at first, especially with sudden movements, so she would do best with an adopter who can be patient and move slowly. Hazel needs a secure habitat with enough space, deep bedding, safe chew items, and quiet daytime rest. She would suit an adult or a responsible older child who understands that hamsters are delicate and mostly active in the evening. With time, Hazel can become a fascinating and rewarding little companion to care for.

pets.name: Cookie
pets.description: Cookie is a friendly cream-colored hamster with a gentle nature and a calm approach to handling. She previously lived with a careful owner who could no longer keep small pets, so she is used to a clean habitat and regular feeding routines. Cookie is healthy and enjoys fresh snacks, cardboard tubes, soft bedding, and evening playtime. She is calmer than many hamsters, but she still needs patience, proper handling, and a peaceful place to rest during the day. Cookie would be a lovely small companion for someone who wants to learn about hamster care and provide a thoughtful enclosure rather than a tiny cage. She enjoys having choices in her environment, including tunnels, chew toys, and places to hide. Cookie has a gentle presence and would do well with an adopter who appreciates quiet, careful animal care.

pets.name: Clover
pets.description: Clover is a gentle cream and tan rabbit with soft fur and a curious personality. She came to the shelter after her previous family realized they could not provide enough space for her long-term care. Clover is healthy, calm, and enjoys fresh greens, good hay, quiet corners, and supervised time outside her enclosure. She is curious without being overly bold and likes to investigate new things at her own pace. Clover would do well in a patient home where she can build trust gradually and have room to hop, stretch, and explore safely. She may be suitable for older children who understand that rabbits need gentle handling and should never be picked up roughly. Clover could also potentially bond with another compatible rabbit after careful introductions. She is a sweet, steady companion for someone ready to offer proper rabbit care.

pets.name: Thumper
pets.description: Thumper is a friendly tan-spotted rabbit with an alert and social personality. He has lived indoors before and is used to household sounds, gentle voices, and regular feeding routines. Thumper is healthy, curious, and enjoys hay, leafy greens, and time to explore safe spaces. He likes being part of the environment and will often investigate what people are doing once he feels comfortable. Thumper needs more than a small cage. He deserves a proper rabbit setup with room to move, places to hide, and daily interaction. He would be a good match for a home that can offer patience, routine, and gentle attention. Older children may enjoy him if they understand rabbit behavior and respect his space. Thumper is bright, engaging, and social, and he will do best with adopters who want to include him in calm everyday life.

pets.name: Poppy
pets.description: Poppy is a playful black rabbit with a bright and energetic nature. She was found in an outdoor area and has become healthier, safer, and more confident since receiving proper care. Poppy enjoys fresh herbs, safe exploration, and investigating toys or new textures in her environment. She is young, alert, and full of curiosity, so she needs space and enrichment rather than a life spent confined. Poppy may be a little cautious at first because of her past, but she responds well to patience and routine. She would suit an adopter who can offer supervised activity, a secure indoor setup, and gentle daily interaction. A home with calm older children could work, provided everyone understands that rabbits need careful handling. With the right care, Poppy will become a lively, charming, and rewarding companion.

pets.name: Coco
pets.description: Coco is a friendly cockatiel with a gentle personality and a curious nature. She came from a home where she was handled kindly but could no longer receive enough daily attention. Coco is healthy, expressive, and enjoys whistling, exploring safe toys, and sitting near people she trusts. She likes routine and can become more confident when her environment is predictable. Coco would be a lovely companion for someone who wants a social bird and can offer gentle interaction every day. She should have a clean, spacious cage, safe perches, enrichment toys, and supervised time outside the cage in a secure room. Cockatiels are sensitive animals, so Coco needs patience, calm handling, and respect for her body language. With a thoughtful adopter, she can become a warm, interactive, and entertaining member of the household.

pets.name: Zippy
pets.description: Zippy is a lively zebra finch who loves flying around his spacious cage and chirping throughout the day. He came from a small group of finches and may enjoy living with another compatible finch if introduced properly. Zippy is healthy, active, and best suited for a calm home that enjoys watching small birds rather than handling them. He brings gentle sound, movement, and life to a room without demanding constant attention from people. Zippy needs a clean cage with enough horizontal space for flight, fresh food, clean water, and safe perches. He would not be happy in a tiny decorative cage or a stressful environment with constant disturbance. He is a wonderful choice for someone who appreciates the natural behavior of small birds and wants to provide a peaceful, well-kept home where he can stay active and comfortable.

pets.name: Kiwi
pets.description: Kiwi is a playful green-cheeked conure with a bright and affectionate personality. She came from an owner who loved her but could not continue meeting her social and enrichment needs. Kiwi is healthy, intelligent, and enjoys attention, safe toys, and gentle interaction with familiar people. She can be funny, curious, and affectionate, but she can also be noisy or demanding when she is bored or ignored, which is completely normal for a social parrot. Kiwi needs an adopter who understands that conures are not low-maintenance pets. She needs routine, supervised out-of-cage time, mental stimulation, and patient handling. She would do best with someone who has bird experience or is committed to learning carefully. In the right home, Kiwi will be a lively, loving companion with a lot of personality and a strong desire to be part of daily life.
